program.name: Proposal Ops Stateful
intake.purpose: Estimate a proposal fee, apply a deterministic discount, and assemble an approval summary that depends on the earlier stage outputs.
intake.stages_json: [{"slug":"intake","is_bootstrap":true},{"slug":"estimate_fee","domain_spec":{"reads":["inputs.initial_user_text.base_hours","inputs.initial_user_text.hourly_rate_usd"],"produces":{"result_json":{"stage":"string","base_hours":"number","hourly_rate_usd":"number","subtotal_usd":"number"},"items_json":["subtotal_usd:<subtotal_usd>"]},"rules":["Parse input.domain[\"inputs.initial_user_text\"] as JSON.","subtotal_usd = base_hours * hourly_rate_usd.","Do not apply discount_pct or budget_usd in estimate_fee; those are consumed by later stages."],"invariants":["result_json.stage must equal estimate_fee.","base_hours and hourly_rate_usd must be echoed from the request.","items_json must be exactly [\"subtotal_usd:<subtotal_usd>\"]."]}},{"slug":"apply_discount","domain_spec":{"reads":["inputs.initial_user_text.discount_pct","estimate_fee.output.result_json.subtotal_usd"],"produces":{"result_json":{"stage":"string","previous_total_usd":"number","discount_pct":"number","discounted_total_usd":"number"},"items_json":["previous_total_usd:<previous_total_usd>","discounted_total_usd:<discounted_total_usd>"]},"rules":["Parse estimate_fee.output.result_json and the original request JSON before computing.","previous_total_usd = estimate_fee.output.result_json.subtotal_usd.","discounted_total_usd = previous_total_usd * (1 - discount_pct / 100)."],"invariants":["result_json.stage must equal apply_discount.","result_json must use exactly the declared key order: stage, previous_total_usd, discount_pct, discounted_total_usd.","previous_total_usd must equal estimate_fee.output.result_json.subtotal_usd.","discount_pct must be echoed from the request.","items_json must be exactly [\"previous_total_usd:<previous_total_usd>\", \"discounted_total_usd:<discounted_total_usd>\"]."]}},{"slug":"approval_summary","domain_spec":{"reads":["inputs.initial_user_text.budget_usd","apply_discount.output.result_json.discounted_total_usd"],"produces":{"result_json":{"stage":"string","approved":"boolean","basis":"string","discounted_total_usd":"number","budget_usd":"number"},"items_json":["approved:<approved>","discounted_total_usd:<discounted_total_usd>"]},"rules":["Parse apply_discount.output.result_json and the original request JSON before summarizing.","approved = discounted_total_usd <= budget_usd.","basis is discounted_total_within_budget when approved is true; otherwise basis is discounted_total_exceeds_budget."],"invariants":["result_json.stage must equal approval_summary.","discounted_total_usd and budget_usd must remain top-level fields.","items_json must include approved:<approved> and discounted_total_usd:<discounted_total_usd>."]}},{"slug":"complete","is_terminal":true}]
